Cell.Data: The DEV TEAM / MISC NOTES column contains info on what text between { } signs means (if applicable). It usually stands for either a numeric value, or a numeric value with an icon. Text between [ ] signs stands for a certain type of icon.

The remains of this transport contain a salvageable energy pod worth: {STR_Rewards}. Unfortunately, its destroyed systems reveal no data on the convoy's origin, destination or what led to its destruction.

Szczątki tego transportu zawierają zasobnik energetyczny o wartości {STR_Rewards}, który można odzyskać. Niestety, skala uszkodzeń jednostek konwoju nie pozwala uzyskać informacji o jego pochodzeniu, celu i przyczynie zniszczenia.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
Dispatch from the Imperial Energy Complex

The logs are intact and it seems that this transport, carrying: {STR_Rewards} was dispatched from a nearby structure ({STR_ExploredStructure}) due to an unknown emergency. The location was added to the map.

Rejestry jednostek są nietknięte – najwyraźniej ten ładunek, {STR_Rewards}, został wysłany z pobliskiego obiektu ({STR_ExploredStructure}) ze względu na nieznaną awarię. Zidentyfikowane miejsce zostało umieszczone na mapie.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy. {STR_ExploredStructure} is a structure on the map.

The logs are intact and it seems that this transport, carrying: {STR_Rewards}, was dispatched from a nearby structure ({STR_ExploredStructure}) for an unknown emergency. The location was added to the map.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy

This energy transport was part of a larger convoy before it was stopped in its tracks by an artillery strike. The wreckage contains a colony upgrade ({STR_BuildingName}) that we could salvage for use in one of our colonies.
Ten transport energii był częścią większego konwoju, ale został zatrzymany przez ostrzał artyleryjski. Wraki zawierają ulepszenie kolonii ({STR_BuildingName}), które możemy wykorzystać.
{STR_BuildingName} is a name of a colony structure.

This energy transport was part of a larger convoy before it was stopped in its tracks out by an artillery strike. The wreckage contains a colony upgrade ({STR_BuildingName}) that we could salvage for use in one of our colonies.
{STR_ColonyName} is a name of a player's colony structure on the map
Add the colony upgrade ({STR_BuildingName}) as a free building to {STR_ColonyName}
Dodaj ulepszenie kolonii ({STR_BuildingName}) jako darmowy budynek, o który powiększy się {STR_ColonyName}.
{STR_BuildingName} is a name of a colony structure. {STR_ColonyName} is a name of a player's colony .
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
This convoy seems to be the site of a failed Spacer raid. A skeleton in Spacer apparel was found inside the wreck, still clenching the valuable item ({STR_ItemName}) that led to its demise.

Ten konwój najwyraźniej padł ofiarą Przestrzenników, coś jednak poszło nie tak. W jednym z wraków znaleźliśmy szkielet w skafandrze Przestrzennika, wciąż trzymający kurczowo cenny przedmiot ({STR_ItemName}), który stał się przyczyną zguby napastników.
{STR_ItemName} in this case is a weapon. Hovering over the name you can see what the weapon is.
{STR_ItemName} in this case is a weapon. Hovering over the name you can see what the weapon is.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy

A lonely Autonom Sentinel is attempting to access the caches still sealed behind the convoy's reinforced doors. It seems unlikely that its efforts to break in will be successful anytime soon. [br/][productioncol]This decision will affect relations with this Faction.[/productioncol]

Samotny wartownik Autonomów próbuje uzyskać dostęp do ładunków nadal zamkniętych za wzmocnionymi drzwiami pojazdów konwoju. Jego wysiłki raczej nie przyniosą rezultatów w przewidywalnej przyszłości. [br/][productioncol]Twoja decyzja będzie mieć wpływ na stosunki z tą frakcją.[/productioncol]
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Autonom improve
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, a stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Autonomami poprawiają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Influence
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations with the Autonom improves
Loot the transport for yourself, gain: {STR_Rewards}
Splądruj transport na swoje potrzeby, a uzyskasz {STR_Rewards}.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Autonom decline
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, ale stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Autonomami pogarszają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but relations with the Autonom declines

Next to the energy pods, we found a nearly depleted, but still intact unit ({STR_UnitName}). It appears to be unable to connect to its control hub, giving us a unique opportunity to use it for our cause.

Przy zasobnikach energetycznych znajdujemy prawie pozbawioną energii, ale poza tym nietkniętą jednostkę ({STR_UnitName}). Wygląda na to, że nie jest ona w stanie połączyć się ze swoim węzłem sterującym, dzięki czemu mamy wyjątkową okazję, by ją przejąć.
{STR_UnitName} is a unit within in the game.

Next to the energy pods we found a nearly depleted, but stillintact unit ({STR_UnitName}). It appears to be unable to connect to its control hub, giving us a unique opportunity to use it for our cause.
Ignore it and loot the pods to get: {STR_Rewards}
Zignoruj ją i splądruj zasobniki, a otrzymasz {STR_Rewards}.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy.
Use the pods to power it up under your control
Naładuj ją za pomocą zasobników i przejmij.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_UnitName} is a unit within in the game.
Use the pods to power up and free it. This will impact your reputation [reputation6/]
Naładuj ją za pomocą zasobników i uwolnij. Będzie to mieć wpływ na twoją reputację [goodalignment/]

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

You find a lone Paragon Soldier on top of the energy pods, standing guard. The Soldier doesn't seem to pose any sort of threat, but he tells you that he is supposed to guard these for the Union's return. [br/][productioncol]This decision will affect relations with this Faction.[/productioncol]

Znajdujesz samotnego żołnierza Wcielenia trzymającego wartę przy zasobnikach energetycznych. Żołnierz nie stanowi zagrożenia; twierdzi, że ma pilnować zasobników do czasu powrotu Związku. [br/][productioncol]Twoja decyzja będzie mieć wpływ na stosunki z tą frakcją.[/productioncol]

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Energy
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Paragon improve
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, a stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Wcieleniem poprawiają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Influence
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations with the Paragon improves
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Paragon decline
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, ale stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Wcieleniem pogarszają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production.
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but relations with the Paragon declines
You find a salvageable Imperial supply reserve, containing: {STR_Rewards}. Unfortunately, the container logs are destroyed and you can't trace where the resources came from.
Znajdujesz nadający się do splądrowania imperialny zapas zaopatrzenia, a w nim {STR_Rewards}. Niestety, rejestr pojemnika jest zniszczony i nie możesz wyśledzić, skąd pochodzą te zasoby.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
You salvage: {STR_Rewards} from the Imperial supply stash. The logs reveal the coordinates of a location ({STR_ExploredStructure}), which seems to be the source of the stash's contents.
Z imperialnego składu zaopatrzenia uzyskujesz {STR_Rewards}. Rejestry zawierają współrzędne pewnego miejsca ({STR_ExploredStructure}), z którego najwyraźniej pochodzi zawartość składu.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production. {STR_ExploredStructure} is a location of structure on the map.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food

Within the containers, you find Biodome prefabs. We could transport these to one of our colonies and easily get a colony upgrade ({STR_BuildingName}), or we could simply take the supplies intended for starting the Biofarm.

W pojemnikach znajdujesz prefabrykaty biokopuły. Moglibyśmy przetransportować je do jednej z naszych kolonii i łatwo zbudować ulepszenie ({STR_BuildingName}) lub po prostu zabrać elementy przeznaczone do stworzenia biofarmy.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_BuildingName} is a name of a colony structure.

Within the containers, you find Biodome prefabs. We could transport these to one of our colonies and easily get a colony upgrade ({STR_BuildingName}) or we could simply take the supplies meant to start the Biofarm.
{STR_ColonyName} is a name of a player's colony
Add the colony upgrade ({STR_BuildingName}) as a free building to {STR_ColonyName}
Dodaj ulepszenie ({STR_BuildingName}) jako darmowy budynek w kolonii {STR_ColonyName}.
{STR_BuildingName} is a name of a structure on the map. {STR_ColonyName} is a name of a player's colony.
Ignore the colony upgrade prefabs and gain: {STR_Rewards}
Zignoruj prefabrykaty ulepszenia kolonii, a uzyskasz zdobycz {STR_Rewards}.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food

As you are about to open the containers, a ragged fellow who looks like a Paragon recluse approaches you on a transport and shows you an item ({STR_ItemName}) as he points towards the container. Seems he wants to trade.

Już masz otworzyć pojemniki, gdy pojawia się jakiś gość w łachmanach, wyglądający na odludka z Wcielenia, i pokazuje ci pewien przedmiot ({STR_ItemName}), wskazując jeden z pojemników. Chyba chce z tobą handlować.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_ItemName} is the name of an Hero Weapon or Mod.

As you are about to open the containers, a ragged fellow that looks like a Paragon recluse approaches you on a transport and shows you an item ({STR_ItemName}) as he points towards the container. Seems he wants a trade.
Trade the food for the item ({STR_ItemName})
{STR_ItemName} is the name of an Hero Weapon or Mod.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
Shoot him, gaining both. This will impact your reputation [reputation0/]
Zastrzel go, a zdobędziesz jedno i drugie. Będzie to mieć wpływ na twoją reputację [anger/]

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_ItemName} is the name of an Hero Weapon or Mod.

A small gang of Spacers approaches you. They ask for the contents of the cache because they are at risk of getting "pwned" if they return to the Scrapyard empty-handed. [br/][productioncol]This decision will affect relations with this Faction.[/productioncol]

Nadchodzi mała grupa Przestrzenników. Nieszczęśnicy proszą cię o zawartość składu, gdyż boją się, że zostaną „zownowani”, jeśli wrócą na Złomowisko z pustymi rękami. [br/][productioncol]Twoja decyzja będzie mieć wpływ na stosunki z tą frakcją.[/productioncol]

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and your relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Spacers improve
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, a twoje stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Przestrzennikami poprawiają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Influence
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and your relation with the Spacers improves
Loot the stash for yourself and gain: {STR_Rewards}
Splądruj skład na własne potrzeby, a uzyskasz {STR_Rewards}.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but your relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Spacers decline
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, ale twoje stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Przestrzennikami pogarszają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but your relation with the Spacers declines

While opening the various containers, a malnourished Growth unit ({STR_UnitName}) scurries from inside one of them. It seems it has devoured the stash inside. However, there are still more containers to search.

Po otwarciu jednego z pojemników znajdujesz w środku niedożywioną jednostkę Matecznika. To {STR_UnitName}. Zdaje się, że stworzenie zdążyło już skonsumować całą zawartość pudła. Zostało jednak jeszcze trochę pojemników do przeszukania.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_UnitName} is a unit within in the game.

When opening the various containers, a malnourished Growth unit ({STR_UnitName}) scurries from inside one of them. It seems it has devoured the stash from this container, however, there are still more left around you.
Feed it, making the unit ({STR_UnitName}) join you

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_UnitName} is a unit within in the game.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_UnitName} is a unit within in the game.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food

A Growth Node can be seen making its way towards this location. It tells you that this cache is the perfect place to feed and grow some of the animals which the Growth have taken under their wing. [br/][productioncol]This decision will affect relations with this Faction.[/productioncol]

Spotykasz pień Matecznika, który kieruje się do tego miejsca. Mówi ci, że ten skład jest idealnym miejscem na wyhodowanie gromady zwierząt, którymi Matecznik się opiekuje. [br/][productioncol]Twoja decyzja będzie mieć wpływ na stosunki z tą frakcją.[/productioncol]

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Grant them the site and gain: {STR_Rewards}
Przekaż Matecznikowi to miejsce, a uzyskasz {STR_Rewards}.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Growth improve
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, a stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Matecznikiem poprawiają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Influence
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations with the Growth improves
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
You receive {STR_Rewards}, but relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Growth decline
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, ale stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Matecznikiem pogarszają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Food
You receive {STR_Rewards}, but relations with the Growth declines

You find a transport containing a salvageable production stash. Unfortunately, the stash's systems are destroyed and provide no data on its origin, destination or the event that lead to its destruction.

Znajdujesz transport, który zawiera nadający się do użytku skład produkcyjny. Niestety, systemy jednostek konwoju są tak zniszczone, że nie można dotrzeć do informacji o jego pochodzeniu, celu ani przyczynie zniszczenia.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

You find a transport containing a salvageable production stash. Unfortunately, the systems of the stash are destroyed and reveal no data on its origin, destination or the event that lead to its destruction.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
You salvage: {STR_Rewards}, from the stash. The logs show you the coordinates of a location ({STR_ExploredStructure}), which seems to be the source of the stash's contents.
Ze składu uzyskujesz {STR_Rewards}. Rejestry ujawniają współrzędne pewnego miejsca ({STR_ExploredStructure}), z którego najwyraźniej pochodzi zawartość składu.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_ExploredStructure} is a structure on the map. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
Take the: {STR_Rewards}, and show the location
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production

Within the crates and materials, you find that this convoy was transporting a colony upgrade ({STR_BuildingName}). We could potentially use the materials to assemble the structure in one of our colonies.
Przeglądając zawartość skrzyń, odkrywasz, że konwój przewoził ulepszenie kolonii ({STR_BuildingName}). Moglibyśmy wykorzystać te materiały, by zmontować taką konstrukcję w jednej z naszych kolonii.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_ColonyName} is a name of a player's colony
Add the colony upgrade as a free building to {STR_ColonyName}
Dodaj ulepszenie jako darmowy budynek w kolonii {STR_ColonyName}.
{STR_ColonyName} is a name of a player's colony
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production

You discover that this transport was carrying blueprints and materials to make two different weapons. Unfortunately, you find that most materials have deteriorated over time and there is only enough left to manufacture one of the weapons.

Odkrywasz, że transport zawiera plany i materiały do produkcji dwóch różnych typów broni. Niestety, okazuje się, że wskutek upływu czasu większość elementów uległa zniszczeniu i części wystarczy na budowę tylko jednej broni.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

You discover that this transport was carrying blueprints and materials to make two different weapons. Unfortunately, you find that most materials have deteriorated over time and only one weapon can be made.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production

Spacers come rushing over to you, begging that you allow them to have the stash. They tell you their trucks are damaged and they need the parts to repair the glitch. [br/][productioncol]This decision will affect relations with this Faction.[/productioncol]

Pędzi ku tobie gromada Przestrzenników, błagając o pozwolenie na zabrania składu. Mówią, że zepsuły się im ciężarówki i potrzebują tych części, by usunąć awarię. [br/][productioncol]Twoja decyzja będzie mieć wpływ na stosunki z tą frakcją.[/productioncol]

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Grant the Spacers the stash and gain: {STR_Rewards}
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and your relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Spacers improve
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, a twoje stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Przestrzennikami poprawiają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Influence
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations with the Spacers improves
Ignore them, loot the site for: {STR_Rewards}
Zignoruj ich i splądruj skład, a uzyskasz {STR_Rewards}.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but your relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Spacers decline
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, ale twoje stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Przestrzennikami pogarszają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but relations with the Spacers declines

A lone Paragon unit ({STR_UnitName}) is found slumped and weakened next to the stash. He tells you the Union left him to rot, and that he would gladly join you if you give him the implants he believes are inside the stash.

W pobliżu składu znajdujesz samotną jednostkę Wcielenia, uszkodzoną i osłabioną. To {STR_UnitName}. Mówi ci, że Związek pozostawił ją tu na śmierć. Chętnie przyłączy się do ciebie, jeśli dasz jej wszczepy, które według niej znajdują się w składzie.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_UnitName} is a unit within in the game.

A lone Paragon unit ({STR_UnitName}) is found slumped and weakened next to the stash. He tells you the Union left him to rot and would gladly join you if he is given the new implants he believes are inside.
Aid and allow the unit ({STR_UnitName}) to join us
Pomóż jednostce ({STR_UnitName}) i pozwól jej się przyłączyć.
{STR_UnitName} is a unit within in the game.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_UnitName} is a unit within in the game.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production

As you prepare to acquire the stash, you receive a Paragon transmission. They explain that the materials you have found arrived on the planet illegally, and that they should be left alone for the Union to confiscate. [br/][productioncol]This decision will affect relations with this Faction.[/productioncol]

Przygotowując się do splądrowania składu, otrzymujesz wiadomość od Wcielenia. Znalezione przez ciebie materiały dotarły na planetę nielegalnie i nie należy ich ruszać, a Związek je skonfiskuje. [br/][productioncol]Twoja decyzja będzie mieć wpływ na stosunki z tą frakcją.[/productioncol]

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Leave the materials behind and gain: {STR_Rewards}
Zostaw materiały w spokoju, a uzyskasz {STR_Rewards}.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and your relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Paragon improve
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, a twoje stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Wcieleniem poprawiają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Influence
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations with the Paragon improves
The Union is not coming back - take: {STR_Rewards}
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Production
The Union is not coming back, take: {STR_Rewards}
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but your relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Paragon decline
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, ale twoje stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Wcieleniem pogarszają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but relations with the Paragon declines
The remains of this research ship contain intact data pads. Unfortunately, they don't reveal any information about the vessel's mission and crew or the events that led to its crash landing.
Szczątki statku badawczego zawierają nietknięte banki danych. Niestety, brak w nich informacji na temat zadania i załogi jednostki ani wydarzeń, które doprowadziły do katastrofy.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
You acquire: {STR_Rewards}, from the ship's data pads. The logs are still intact, showing you the coordinates to a location ({STR_ExploredStructure}).
Z pokładowych banków danych uzyskujesz {STR_Rewards}. Rejestry są nadal nietknięte i zawierają współrzędne pewnego miejsca ({STR_ExploredStructure}).

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_ExploredStructure} is a structure on the map. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
You acquire: {STR_Rewards}, from the ship's data pads. The logs are still intact and it shows you the coordinates to a location ({STR_ExploredStructure}).
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research

Within its wrecked hull, you find that this ship was transporting a colony upgrade ({STR_BuildingName}). We could assemble it at one of our bases, or study and dismantle it to gain insight into old Union architectures.

W poskręcanym kadłubie statku odkrywasz, że przewoził on ulepszenie kolonii ({STR_BuildingName}). Moglibyśmy zmontować je w jednej z naszych baz albo rozebrać na części i zbadać, by poznać dawne technologie Związku.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_ColonyName} is a name of a player's colony
Add the colony upgrade as a free building to {STR_ColonyName}
Dodaj ulepszenie jako darmowy budynek w kolonii {STR_ColonyName}.
{STR_ColonyName} is a name of a player's colony
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research

You find an intact item ({STR_ItemName}) inside the analytics and diagnostics chamber. We could keep the item, or we could activate the diagnostic protocols in order to study it, destroying the item in the process.

W przedziale analityczno-diagnostycznym znajdujesz nietknięty przedmiot. To {STR_ItemName}. Moglibyśmy zachować tę zdobycz albo uruchomić protokoły diagnostyczne w celu jej zbadania, co jednak oznaczałoby zniszczenie przedmiotu.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

You find an intact item ({STR_ItemName}) inside the analytics and diagnostics chamber. We could acquire it or activate the diagnostic protocols in order to study it, but the process would destroy the item.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research

Research pertaining to the Void, including some samples, are found inside this ship, accompanied by a small Psi-Fish group. They seem interested in the contents of the ship, but you could alternatively use these samples to advance your own research. [br/][productioncol]This decision will affect relations with this Faction.[/productioncol]

W statku znajdujesz opisy badań Głębi z kilkoma próbkami oraz małą grupką Ryb Psionicznych włącznie. Stworzenia wydają się zainteresowane zawartością wraku, ale twoi naukowcy mogliby wykorzystać te próbki w swoich badaniach. [br/][productioncol]Twoja decyzja będzie mieć wpływ na stosunki z tą frakcją.[/productioncol]

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
Give the Psi-Fish the data logs and gain: {STR_Rewards}
Daj Rybom Psionicznym znalezione rejestry danych, a uzyskasz {STR_Rewards}.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and your relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Psi-Fish improve
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, a twoje stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Rybami Psionicznymi poprawiają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Influence
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations with the Psi-Fish improves
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but your relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Psi-Fish decline
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, ale twoje stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Rybami Psionicznymi pogarszają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but relations with the Psi-Fish declines

Inside the vessel you find a Psi-Fish unit ({STR_UnitName}) trapped in a glass vat, unconscious. According to the ship's remaining logs, the machinery that is attached to the vat has the following functions:

W statku, uwięziona w szklanym zbiorniku, znajduje się nieprzytomna jednostka Ryb Psionicznych. To {STR_UnitName}. Według ocalałych rejestrów pokładowych połączona z tym zbiornikiem maszyneria ma następujące funkcje:

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_UnitName} is a unit within in the game.
Imprint: Release the unit ({STR_UnitName}) under your command
Wdrukowanie – uwolnienie jednostki ({STR_UnitName}) i przejęcie nad nią kontroli.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
Flush: Free it to the wild. This will impact your reputation [reputation6/]
Spłukanie – wypuszczenie jednostki na wolność. Będzie to mieć wpływ na twoją reputację [happiness/].

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

Inside the crashed ship, you find an Autonom Monitor trying to access the data logs, but the security is proving troublesome. You could either help it or retrieve the logs for yourself. [br/][productioncol]This decision will affect relations with this Faction.[/productioncol]

W rozbitym statku znajdujesz monitora Autonomów, który próbuje uzyskać dostęp do pokładowych rejestrów danych, ma jednak problemy z zabezpieczeniami. Możesz albo mu pomóc, albo zabrać rejestry. [br/][productioncol]Twoja decyzja będzie mieć wpływ na stosunki z tą frakcją.[/productioncol]

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Autonom improve
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, a stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Autonomami poprawiają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Influence
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, and relations with the Autonom improves
Ignore it and retrieve: {STR_Rewards}, for yourself
Zignoruj go i zachowaj {STR_Rewards} dla siebie.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but relations [diplomaticlinks/] with the Autonom decline
Otrzymujesz {STR_Rewards}, ale stosunki [diplomaticlinks/] z Autonomami pogarszają się.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text. {STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Research
You receive: {STR_Rewards}, but relations with the Autonom declines
You find salvageable Cosmite[tricorium/] at this location.
Znajdujesz w tym miejscu[tricorium/] kosmit, który możesz pozyskać.
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Cosmite
{STR_Rewards} in this case is an interger value followed with an icon of Cosmite
You recently performed a good action.
Masz na koncie niedawny dobry uczynek.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.
You recently performed an evil action.
Masz na sumieniu niedawny zły uczynek.

This text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

In the text below, text refers to a person that can either be male or female. If relevant for translation, please use the ‘localized string’ column for the male text and the ‘alternative localized string’ column for the female text.

In the text below, any inserted strings - anything of the form {text} - is replaced by an integer value for the thing described in the brackets. If the {text} is not followed by a unit - e.g. shields, hitpoints - the icon for the unit is inserted together with the integer. The same holds for symbols - e.g. '+', '%' - which are occasionally inserted together with the integer.
For references to game terminology and in-world references, please check the glossary delivered as part of the documentation.
